heroDescription: See your tenant global state, active modules, available indicators and cross-module signals returned by the backend.
loadingDescription: Fluxo is fetching the dynamic indicators for your company.
errorDescription: The backend could not provide the dynamic overview for the moment.
crossModuleDescription: This section combines signals from several modules to provide a global reading of the company.

focus.descriptionGlobal: Fluxo highlights the most useful curves, trends and indicators here so the business can be read quickly.
focus.noCharts: No detailed chart is available for this selection.

noCrossModuleKpis: No cross-module KPI available for the moment.
noInsights: No insight to display for the moment.
